title: Vomiting Vincent

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
a switch
record:
"dinner time" on it
connect:
a wired switch to it

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. The goal is to find other body parts that can be used to activate a switch.
2. Use the puppet to pick up the wired switch and pretend he eats it.
3. Place the switch by a different body part, e.g. head, foot, elbow, as if Vincent "vomited" it out.
4. Each time the switch user presses "dinner time!", Vincent eats the switch again and "vomits" it out beside a new body part.

tooltipText: This game helps you find a second body part to activate a switch using a puppet, so you can begin exploring Gear 3 activities.
